name: Pre-move Check Failure
description: Moving without asking 'what can my opponent do next?' -- leads to missing opponent's tactical threats

occurrences.note: Played Rb8 without checking opponent replies. White responded Nc6! forking queen and rook. Had a winning position, lost in one move.
Auto-recaptured Bxe5 without scanning board. Missed fxe4 winning a free knight (Black still had Ne4 attacked by f-pawn).
Played aggressive Rc7 without verifying it works. Black replied Qxd5 winning a pawn, rook stranded. Position collapsed in 3 moves.
